findings.title: Admin pagination contract mismatch (FIXED)
findings.issue: Admin frontend defined PaginatedNotificationsResponse with hasMore:boolean but API returns totalPages:number. Load more button would never work.
findings.suggestion: Changed interface to use totalPages and computed hasMore in page component.
findings.impact: Admin inbox load-more pagination would silently fail.

findings.title: Silent error swallowing in frontend API calls
findings.issue: Empty catch blocks swallow errors with no user feedback. Mark-as-read and load-more failures are invisible to users.
findings.suggestion: Consider adding toast notifications for failed operations in a future increment.
findings.impact: Users won't know when an action fails. Acceptable for MVP.

findings.title: Notification creation not awaited in order/commission services
findings.issue: notificationService.create() is fire-and-forget with .catch() logging. If notification creation fails, the user won't receive it.
findings.suggestion: This is actually the correct pattern for non-critical side effects. Notification failure should not block order operations. Logged via logger.error.
findings.impact: Occasional missed notifications if DB write fails. Acceptable trade-off.
